name: aberdeen
author: Frank van Viegen
description: Build fast reactive UIs in pure TypeScript/JavaScript without a virtual DOM.

scripts.build: bun run build:clean && bun run build:src && bun run build:min && bun run build:types && bun run build:tests && bun run build:docs && bun run build:skill
scripts.build:src: bun build src/aberdeen.ts src/dispatcher.ts src/prediction.ts src/route.ts src/transitions.ts --sourcemap --target browser --external '*/aberdeen.js' --outdir dist/src/
scripts.build:min: for f in dist/src/*.js; do base=$(basename "$f" .js); bun build "$f" --minify --sourcemap --external './*.js' --outdir /tmp/aberdeen-min/ && mv /tmp/aberdeen-min/"$(basename $f)" "dist/src/${base}.min.js" && mv /tmp/aberdeen-min/"$(basename $f).map" "dist/src/${base}.min.js.map"; done && rm -rf /tmp/aberdeen-min
scripts.build:tests: bun build tests/helpers.ts tests/fakedom.ts --sourcemap --target bun --external 'aberdeen' --outdir dist/tests/
scripts.build:docs: typedoc && rm -rf dist-docs/assets/aberdeen && cp -r dist/src dist-docs/assets/aberdeen
scripts.build:skill: typedoc --plugin typedoc-plugin-markdown --out skill --tsconfig tsconfig.json --entryPoints src/aberdeen.ts src/dispatcher.ts src/prediction.ts src/route.ts src/transitions.ts --excludeInternal --excludePrivate --hideGenerator --readme none --router module && rm -rf skill/assets skill/documents skill/README.md && cat SKILL.md > skill/SKILL.md && awk '/^-+$/ { count++; next } count >= 2' docs/Tutorial.md >> skill/SKILL.md
